title: Principal Mechanical Rotating Engineer
description:
Responsibilities

  • Perform mechanical design activities including equipment selection, technical calculations, and design verification.

  • Prepare, review, and approve mechanical engineering deliverables and technical documents.

  • Coordinate and communicate with overseas clients on mechanical design schemes and technical solutions.

  • Resolve mechanical discipline-related issues raised by clients during project execution.

  • Support procurement activities including preparation of technical tender documents, technical clarifications, and bid evaluations.

  • Review vendor drawings, data sheets, and technical submissions to ensure compliance with project requirements.

  • Participate in vendor meetings and Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) as required.

  • Coordinate comment resolution and ensure timely close-out of technical queries.

  • Ensure all engineering work complies with applicable international standards, project specifications, and company procedures.

  • Carry out other related duties assigned by the client or project management team.

Qualifications

  • Minimum Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related discipline.

  • Minimum 15 years of experience in offshore mechanical engineering design, including offshore platforms, FPSOs, and semi-submersible facilities.

  • Strong technical knowledge of rotating equipment used in offshore oil and gas facilities.

  • Familiar with international engineering standards including API and ASME.

  • Experience in EPC or engineering consultancy environments is preferred.

  • Able to support procurement engineering activities including technical bid evaluation and vendor document review.

  • Candidates with ASME Section VIII certification will have an added advantage.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

  • Strong sense of responsibility, able to work independently, and willing to support project deadlines when required.

    We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

    Brunel International S.E.A Pte. Ltd.

    UEN No: 199603098R

    EA License No: 16S8067

    Shahidan Yusof - R1658969

postedCompany.description:
Brunel is a leading provider of recruitment and workforce solutions throughout Asia and around the world. We excel at connecting specialist jobseekers with employment opportunities across conventional and renewable energy, life sciences, mining and manufacturing.


Our extensive network is comprised of 20 offices throughout Asia, including Brunel’s regional headquarters in Singapore and satellite offices across China, Japan, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, South Korea and Taiwan + a further 100 locations worldwide.
postedCompany.name: BRUNEL INTERNATIONAL SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE. LTD.
